message:
Add comprehensive tests for daemon execution verifier

- Add verifier_test.go with tests for all execution gate conditions
- Test VerifyExecutionAllowed with various status, expiry, and approval scenarios
- Test VerifyAndMarkExecuting including race condition handling
- Test MarkExecutionComplete for success and failure cases
- Test ToIPCResponse conversion

Closes bead f4c.8 (daemon verifier for execution gate conditions)
